CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Engine_Base_Price_Eng_Sc__c), null, IF ( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Airbus' , ( leaseworks__Escalation__c * leaseworks__Total_Base_Price_M_Eng_Sc__c) * 100, leaseworks__Escalated_Price_PDP_Input__c ))
CustomField.label: Escalated Price(PDP) - Eng Scenario
